description: Path B: Carry / Volatility Risk Premium / Cross-Asset hypotheses. Separate from Direction A+B (technical/statistical) because the economic mechanisms are fundamentally different.

stopping_rule.description: Stop if 3 hypotheses in a row are REJECTED. Rationale: carry/vol/cross-asset share regime-dependence; 3 consecutive failures suggest the edge class itself is broken, not just individual hypotheses.

sacred_holdout.open_policy: Opening this file and running any backtest against it counts as 1 trial. Cannot be reopened.

notes: Created 2026-07-19. Option B: separate ledger from main (trial_ledger.json) because Path B hypotheses are economically different from technical/statistical strategies.
Main ledger has 1 slot left (1021/1022). Path B needs 3+ hypotheses. Expanding main ledger cap would invalidate DSR correction for existing 43 variants.
Factor-Control rule (R-squared > 0.30 with DXY/VIX/SPX) applies to all Path B hypotheses retroactively and forward.
